svg.title: Whitebox Component Diagram: Fulfillment Module
svg.desc: Checkout Flow -> Submit Fulfillment; Returns Flow -> Cancel Fulfillment; Operations Console -> Fulfillment Status; Submit Fulfillment -> Order Intake.Accept Request; Cancel Fulfillment -> Cancellation Desk.Cancel Request; Fulfillment Status -> Status Projector.Read Status; Order Intake.Accept Request -> Order Writer.Persistence API; Order Writer.Audit Feed -> Audit Logger.Audit API; Order Intake.Stock Need required Stock Reservation -> Inventory Client.Reservation API provided Stock Reservation; Order Intake.Label Need required Label Purchase -> Carrier Client.Label API provided Label Purchase; Order Intake.Notify Need required Notification Dispatch -> Notifier.Notification API provided Notification Dispatch
svg.metadata: Diagram Complexity Signal raw metrics: ports=15; component_ports=3; part_ports=12; parts=8; externals=3; interfaces=3; interface_roles=6; connectors=11; warnings=ports>=10,connectors>=10,parts>=6
svg.text: Order Intake.Accept Request -> Order Writer.Persistence API
Order Writer.Audit Feed -> Audit Logger.Audit API
Order Intake.Stock Need required Stock Reservation -> Inventory Client.Reservation API provided Stock Reservation
Order Intake.Label Need required Label Purchase -> Carrier Client.Label API provided Label Purchase
Order Intake.Notify Need required Notification Dispatch -> Notifier.Notification API provided Notification Dispatch
